meaning: 利沃夫[苏联乌克兰西部城市]
examples: Under Soviet rule, the city usually went by the Russian name of Lvov;
The Ukrainian city lvov has recently installed what might just be the world's biggest crossword (in physical size).
But the storm has continued, as Dr. Lvov has stuck by his charges and other specialists too have cast doubt on the official figures.
In the coffee houses of Lvov, optimistic Galician intellectuals see all this as a backhanded compliment.
Community life in Cherche, a village 80 miles south of Lvov, is strong.
